soc2_opinion: Qualified — CC6.1 exception: User access reviews not performed at required frequency (4 of 12 quarterly reviews missed)
review_notes: Reviewed SOC 2 Type II report. QUALIFIED OPINION on CC6.1 — vendor's user access review process had exceptions. 4 of 12 required quarterly access reviews were not completed during the audit period. Auditor noted this represents a deviation from the control description. Vendor management response states they have hired additional IAM staff and implemented automated access review tooling (Sailpoint) effective Q2 2025. CUECs documented.
follow_up_status: Acknowledged — No formal risk assessment completed
follow_up_notes: Noted the qualified opinion on CC6.1. Cloudmatic manages our CIAM platform including customer authentication. Their access review failures could impact the security of customer identity infrastructure. Policy OD-GRC-POL-007 Section 4.3.4 requires risk assessment for qualified opinions. Karen escalated to Angela Torres on June 20 — Angela acknowledged and said she would schedule the risk assessment. As of December 31, 2025, no formal risk assessment has been documented.
